stemHtml:
An aircraft leaves Guam (13°00'N 143°45E) at 20:00 Standard Time on the 30th April to fly to Los Angeles, California, USA, (33°50N 117°15W). The flight time is 11 hours 15 minutes. What is the Standard Time (ST) and date of arrival in Los Angeles?

Consider the following:

Guam is 10 hours different from UTC and does NOT keep daylight-saving time.
Los Angeles is 8 hours different from UTC and keeps daylight-saving time.
Assume daylight-saving time applies from the 11th March to the 4th November.
